# Completions - Bash Script

Generate a bash completion script for the  command-line interface.

## Usage

The script command can be executed using the following syntax:


```bash
$ npx cli completions bash script [options]
```


```bash
$ yarn exec cli completions bash script [options]
```


```bash
$ pnpm exec cli completions bash script [options]
```


```bash
$ bun x cli completions bash script [options]
```


## Options

The following options are available for the script command:

This command does not have any options.
